meaning: n.破处,破缝,泪滴,眼泪,扯,飞奔,激怒vi.流泪,撕破,猛冲,飞奔,被撕破vt.扯,撕,撕破,戳破,拉掉,折磨,使分裂,撕掉
examples: Ann wiped a tear from her eye.
Police used tear gas to disperse the crowds.
Police dispersed the protesters with tear gas.
It could have said to Malone: We're not buying unless you tear up that Starz contract.
Many protesters marched carrying supplies of lemons and milk, to soothe the effects of tear gas.
